name: Wine and Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the white wine, shredded cheddar cheese, butter, salt, and sugar in a large bowl.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are incorporated.
3. In a separate bowl, combine the bread flour and yeast.
4. Gradually add the dry mixture to the wet mixture, stirring until just combined.
5. Pour the batter into your bread machine or a greased loaf pan.
6. Follow your bread machine's instructions for baking, or bake in a preheated oven at 375°F (190°C) for about 35-40 minutes, or until golden brown and sounds hollow when tapped on the bottom.
7. Remove from the oven and let cool before serving.
